ddls:
CREATE TABLE "snps" (
  "snp_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the SNP */,
  "allele1" TEXT /* First allele variant */,
  "allele2" TEXT /* Second allele variant */,
  "eaf" REAL /* Effect Allele Frequency */,
  "beta" REAL /* Effect size estimate */,
  "se" REAL /* Standard error of the effect size */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the association */,
  "discovery_study" TEXT /* Discovery study associated with the SNP */,
  "units" TEXT /* Measurement units for the effect size */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* The chromosome on which the SNP is located */,
  "position" INTEGER /* The position of the SNP on the chromosome */,
  "trait" TEXT /* The disease or phenotype associated with the SNP */,
  "population" TEXT /* The population in which the SNP was studied */,
  "imputation" INTEGER /* Whether the SNP was imputed or directly genotyped */,
  "reference_genome" TEXT /* The reference genome version used */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the SNP */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("snp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snps_discovery_study FOREIGN KEY ("discovery_study") REFERENCES discovery_studies ("study_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "discovery_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the discovery study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the discovery study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the study */,
  "year_started" INTEGER /* Year the study commenced */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* The type of study (e.g., case-control, cohort) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* The number of individuals in the study */,
  "geographical_location" TEXT /* The geographical location where the study was conducted */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* The source of funding for the study */,
  "lead_researcher" TEXT /* The lead researcher of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alleles" (
  "allele_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the allele entry */,
  "snp_id" TEXT /* SNP identifier linked to the allele */,
  "allele_type" TEXT /* Type of allele (e.g., Effect, Non-Effect) */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the allele in the population */,
  "allele_frequency_source" TEXT /* The source of the allele frequency data (e.g., 1000 Genomes, dbSNP) */,
  "allele_frequency_population" TEXT /* The specific population for the allele frequency */,
  "allele_frequency_reference" TEXT /* The reference dataset used for the allele frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allele_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alleles_snp_id FOREIGN KEY ("snp_id") REFERENCES snps ("snp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization researcher is affiliated with */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the researcher (e.g., Principal Investigator, Data Analyst) */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* The research interests of the researcher */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* The contact phone number of the researcher */,
  "address" TEXT /* The physical address of the researcher's affiliation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)
